_meta.purpose: Hop-categorized answer key for retrieval-accuracy evaluation of the Expert Finder GraphRAG pipeline.
_meta.source: Evaluation final 20-query set updated from Evaluation (2)(1).docx
_meta.hop_definition: Hop count follows the professor's competency-question/entity-path definition used in the evaluation table.

questions.question: Which main projects have sub-projects related to durian research?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (sub:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Proj]->(main:cfProj)
WHERE toLower(sub.cfKeyw) CONTAINS 'durian'
   OR toLower(sub.cfTitleEN) CONTAINS 'durian'
RETURN DISTINCT main.cfTitleEN AS mainProject
ground_truth: Grading Standards and Quality Certification for Durian Export to China
questions.notes: Project-only lookup under the professor's entity-path hop definition.

questions.question: Find researchers specialized in postharvest technology or smart farming.
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(p.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'postharvest'
   OR toLower(coalesce(p.cfResInt,'')) CONTAINS 'postharvest'
   OR toLower(coalesce(p.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'smart farming'
   OR toLower(coalesce(p.cfResInt,'')) CONTAINS 'smart farming'
RETURN DISTINCT p.cfPersNameEN
questions.notes: Expert lookup using researcher attributes.

questions.question: Find researchers specialized in postharvest technology or smart farming.
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(p.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'postharvest'
   OR toLower(coalesce(p.cfResInt,'')) CONTAINS 'postharvest'
   OR toLower(coalesce(p.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'smart farming'
   OR toLower(coalesce(p.cfResInt,'')) CONTAINS 'smart farming'
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    p.cfKeyw AS keywords,
    p.cfResInt AS researchInterest
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Expert lookup using cfKeyw and cfResInt.

questions.question: Who are the researchers working on longan research projects?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Pers]->(p:cfPers)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    proj.cfTitleEN AS project
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Project-to-expert retrieval.

questions.question: Which researchers hold patents?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)-[:cfPers_ResPat]->(pat:cfResPat)
RETURN DISTINCT p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher
questions.notes: Expert-to-patent relationship.

questions.question: What publications are related to AI-based longan grading projects?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_ResPubl]->(pub:cfResPubl)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
  AND (
       toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'ai'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'machine vision'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'grading'
  )
RETURN DISTINCT pub.cfTitleEN AS publication
ground_truth: Efficiency of Machine Vision System in Longan Grading: A Comparative Study
Machine Vision Grading vs Expert Panel: Benchmarking Longan Quality Assessment
questions.notes: Changed cfTitle to cfTitleEN to match English pipeline output. Added PUB021 which also comes from PROJ001 (longan+machine vision+grading).

questions.question: Which patents are related to longan or durian projects?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_ResPat]->(pat:cfResPat)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
RETURN DISTINCT pat.cfTitleEN AS patent
ground_truth: High-Precision Longan Grading Device Using Machine Vision System
Non-Destructive Durian Ripeness Detection System Using Portable NIR Sensor
questions.notes: Changed cfTitle to cfTitleEN to match English pipeline output.

questions.question: Which researchers have both a patent and a publication related to postharvest technology?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)-[:cfPers_ResPubl]->(pub)
MATCH (p)-[:cfPers_ResPat]->(pat)
RETURN DISTINCT p.cfPersNameEN
questions.notes: Expert must have both publication and patent relationships.

questions.question: Which facilities are associated with research projects?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Facil]->(fac:cfFacil)
RETURN DISTINCT fac.cfNameEN AS facility
ORDER BY facility
questions.notes: Project-to-facility relationship.

questions.question: Which organizations are involved in projects related to AI-based fruit grading through their affiliated researchers?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (org:cfOrgUnit)<-[:cfPers_OrgUnit]-(p:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'ai'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'machine vision'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'grading'
RETURN DISTINCT org.cfNameEN AS organization
questions.notes: Organizations reached through affiliated researchers on AI/grading projects.

questions.question: Find researchers who lead projects on longan or durian that have received funding and produced at least one publication.
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Pers {cfClassId:'ProjectLeader'}]->(p:cfPers)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_Fund]->(f:cfFund)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_ResPubl]->(pub:cfResPubl)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
RETURN DISTINCT p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher
questions.notes: Project must be led by researcher, have funding, and have project-linked publication.

questions.question: Which funding sources support projects associated with Chiang Mai University?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_OrgUnit]->(org:cfOrgUnit)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_Fund]->(fund:cfFund)
WHERE org.cfNameEN = 'Chiang Mai University'
RETURN DISTINCT fund.cfNameEN AS fund
questions.notes: Uses project organization and funding source. WARNING: verify this ground truth by running the Cypher hint directly in Neo4j Browser against the loaded v6 graph -- ARDA Precision Agriculture Grant and TSRI links to CMU-coordinated projects were not confirmed in the schema file.

questions.question: Which projects are led by researchers who have both patents and publications?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)-[:cfPers_ResPat]->(:cfResPat)
MATCH (p)-[:cfPers_ResPubl]->(:cfResPubl)
MATCH (p)<-[:cfProj_Pers {cfClassId:'ProjectLeader'}]-(proj:cfProj)
RETURN DISTINCT proj.cfTitleEN AS project
ground_truth: Development of Automated Longan Grading System Using Machine Vision to Reduce Downgrading
Study of Causes and Solutions to Reduce Longan Quality Downgrading in Supply Chain
NIR Technology for Non-Destructive Durian Ripeness and Quality Assessment
Grading Standards and Quality Certification for Durian Export to China
MAP Packaging Technology for Fresh Longan to Extend Shelf Life and Maintain Quality
Packaging Technology for Rice to Maintain Freshness and Nutritional Value
Innovative Frozen Durian Packaging for China and ASEAN Markets
Smart Cold Chain for Export Longan with IoT Monitoring
Development of Biocoating for Fresh Longan Postharvest Extension
Drone Survey and Rice Plant Health Analysis Using NDVI
Durian Growth Monitoring System Using AI and Remote Sensing
AI-Based Longan Disease and Pest Diagnosis from Smartphone Images
questions.notes: Project leaders must have both patent and publication relationships.

questions.question: Find researchers who have published papers related to packaging or shelf life, including publication year.
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_ResPubl]->(pub:cfResPubl)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(pub.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'packaging'
   OR toLower(coalesce(pub.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'shelf life'
   OR toLower(coalesce(pub.cfTitle,'')) CONTAINS 'packaging'
   OR toLower(coalesce(pub.cfTitle,'')) CONTAINS 'shelf life'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'packaging'
   OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'shelf life'
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    proj.cfTitleEN AS project,
    pub.cfTitleEN AS publication,
    pub.cfResPublDate AS publicationYear
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Duplicate researchers removed from ground truth.

questions.question: Which projects use facilities and involve researchers who have authored publications?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (pub:cfResPubl)<-[:cfPers_ResPubl]-(p:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Facil]->(fac:cfFacil)
RETURN DISTINCT proj.cfTitleEN AS project
ground_truth: Development of Automated Longan Grading System Using Machine Vision to Reduce Downgrading
Study of Causes and Solutions to Reduce Longan Quality Downgrading in Supply Chain
Precision Longan Orchard Management Innovation Using Sensors and IoT
Smart Farm: AI-IoT Intelligent Greenhouse for Safe Vegetable Production
Breeding of Drought-Tolerant Glutinous Rice RD6 with Improved Cooking Quality
Standards and Traceability System for Thai Jasmine Rice in Export Markets
MAP Packaging Technology for Fresh Longan to Extend Shelf Life and Maintain Quality
Packaging Technology for Rice to Maintain Freshness and Nutritional Value
Prevention and Management of Phytophthora Root Rot in Durian Using Biocontrol Agents
Grading Standards and Quality Certification for Durian Export to China
questions.notes: Project must use a facility and involve a researcher who authored a publication.

questions.question: Which researchers have received funding from NRCT or NSTDA, and what projects are funded?
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Fund]->(fund:cfFund)
WHERE toLower(coalesce(fund.cfNameEN,'')) CONTAINS 'nrct'
   OR toLower(coalesce(fund.cfNameEN,'')) CONTAINS 'nstda'
   OR toLower(coalesce(fund.cfName,'')) CONTAINS 'วช'
   OR toLower(coalesce(fund.cfName,'')) CONTAINS 'nstda'
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    proj.cfTitleEN AS project,
    fund.cfNameEN AS fundingSource
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Fund filtered by NRCT/NSTDA names.

questions.question: Find researchers working on longan or durian projects with TRL >= 7, including their affiliated organization and province.
questions.relationship_tested: Expert -> OrgUnit -> Address + Expert -> Project -> Measurement
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)-[:cfPers_OrgUnit]->(org:cfOrgUnit)
OPTIONAL MATCH (org)-[:cfOrgUnit_PAddr]->(addr:cfPAddr)
MATCH (p)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_Meas]->(meas:cfMeas)<-[:cfIndic_Meas]-(ind:cfIndic)
WHERE ind.cfIndicId = 'INDIC003'
  AND (
       toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
  )
  AND toInteger(coalesce(meas.cfCountInt, meas.cfValFloatP, meas.cfVal, 0)) >= 7
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    org.cfNameEN AS organization,
    addr.cfCity AS province,
    proj.cfTitleEN AS project,
    toInteger(coalesce(meas.cfCountInt, meas.cfValFloatP, meas.cfVal, 0)) AS trl
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Requires researcher organization/province and TRL-filtered longan/durian project.

questions.question: Find researchers who have both a journal publication and a product with TRL >= 7 from the same project.
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_ResPubl]->(pub:cfResPubl)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_ResProd]->(prod:cfResProd)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_Meas]->(meas:cfMeas)<-[:cfIndic_Meas]-(ind:cfIndic)
WHERE ind.cfIndicId = 'INDIC003'
  AND toInteger(coalesce(meas.cfCountInt, meas.cfValFloatP, meas.cfVal, 0)) >= 7
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    proj.cfTitleEN AS project,
    pub.cfTitleEN AS publication,
    prod.cfNameEN AS product,
    toInteger(coalesce(meas.cfCountInt, meas.cfValFloatP, meas.cfVal, 0)) AS trl
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Publication, product, and TRL must be associated with the same project.

questions.question: Find researchers working on longan or durian projects that have innovations with TRL >= 7.
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)
MATCH (proj)-[:cfProj_Meas]->(meas:cfMeas)<-[:cfIndic_Meas]-(ind:cfIndic)
WHERE ind.cfIndicId = 'INDIC003'
  AND (
       toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfKeyw,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'longan'
    OR toLower(coalesce(proj.cfTitleEN,'')) CONTAINS 'durian'
  )
  AND toInteger(coalesce(meas.cfCountInt, meas.cfValFloatP, meas.cfVal, 0)) >= 7
RETURN DISTINCT
    p.cfPersNameEN AS researcher,
    proj.cfTitleEN AS project,
    toInteger(coalesce(meas.cfCountInt, meas.cfValFloatP, meas.cfVal, 0)) AS trl
ORDER BY researcher
questions.notes: Longan/durian project with TRL >= 7.

questions.question: Find researchers whose collaborators are affiliated with different organizations and have authored publications related to longan or durian research.
questions.relationship_tested: Expert -> Collaborator -> Organization + Expert -> Collaborator -> Publication
questions.cypher_hint:
MATCH (p1:cfPers)<-[:cfProj_Pers]-(proj:cfProj)-[:cfProj_Pers]->(p2:cfPers)
WHERE p1 <> p2
MATCH (p1)-[:cfPers_OrgUnit]->(org1:cfOrgUnit)
MATCH (p2)-[:cfPers_OrgUnit]->(org2:cfOrgUnit)
MATCH (p2)-[:cfPers_ResPubl]->(pub:cfResPubl)
WHERE org1 <> org2
  AND (
       toLower(pub.cfTitleEN) CONTAINS 'longan'
    OR toLower(pub.cfTitleEN) CONTAINS 'durian'
  )
RETURN DISTINCT p1.cfPersNameEN AS researcher
questions.notes: Changed pub.cfTitle to pub.cfTitleEN to match English pipeline output. Requires collaborator, different organization, and collaborator publication related to longan or durian.
